VT Identity Set 02

A package-first brand experiment built from the opposite direction: four fresh project marks, five brand-new VT organization marks, three refined finalist directions, and now two hybrid families: the original org-led matrix plus a new balanced matrix where brand and package share the stage evenly.

4 package marks 5 VT marks 15 finalist marks 40 hybrids 64 svg files

Project Logos

Fresh package identities that act as the secondary DNA for the hybrid symbols.

independent package marks
Package

vt-playground

vt-playground.svg
A launch-loop symbol with motion, staging, and a bright signal node.
Package

vt-design-system

vt-design-system.svg
A modular blueprint mark built from rails, tiles, and a structured axis.
Package

gemini-ai-lib

gemini-ai-lib.svg
A node-core emblem that leans toward runtime topology and connected intelligence.
Package

vt-asset-studio

vt-asset-studio.svg
A crop-frame studio mark with an artboard core and a creation spark for asset work.

VT Organization Logos

Five new parent-brand directions created from scratch in this isolated folder.

org-first carriers
VT Mark

Cascade

vt-cascade.svg
A top beam with falling slats for a sense of layered output and momentum.
VT Mark

Keystone

vt-keystone.svg
An arched support symbol that feels foundational, steady, and architectural.
VT Mark

Turbine

vt-turbine.svg
Rotational energy around a fixed axle for a strong systems-and-motion identity.
VT Mark

Facet

vt-facet.svg
A crystalline badge with bright planes and a hard-edged internal hierarchy.
VT Mark

Banner

vt-banner.svg
A ceremonial banner silhouette with a strong vertical spine and crest interior.

Finalist Directions

Three shortlisted directions refined for stronger silhouette, better small-size readability, and more coherent package applications.

3 finalists 15 refined marks

Keystone Final

foundation + architecture
Finalist Base

Keystone Final

vt-keystone-final.svg
The strongest architectural option, with a stable arch and a very clear VT read.
Finalist Package

Keystone x vt-playground

vt-keystone-final-vt-playground.svg
A grounded system shape with a more expressive motion cue for exploration work.
Finalist Package

Keystone x vt-design-system

vt-keystone-final-vt-design-system.svg
Probably the most credible system-brand direction if consistency is the main goal.
Finalist Package

Keystone x gemini-ai-lib

vt-keystone-final-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Turns the same structural base into something reliable and infrastructure-leaning.
Finalist Package

Keystone x vt-asset-studio

vt-keystone-final-vt-asset-studio.svg
A grounded studio direction that feels crafted, framed, and dependable for asset work.

Turbine Final

motion + systems energy
Finalist Base

Turbine Final

vt-turbine-final.svg
The boldest systems mark, with the cleanest sense of rotation and forward energy.
Finalist Package

Turbine x vt-playground

vt-turbine-final-vt-playground.svg
Feels especially strong for a playground brand because the motion reads immediately.
Finalist Package

Turbine x vt-design-system

vt-turbine-final-vt-design-system.svg
More unconventional, but interesting if the system should feel active rather than static.
Finalist Package

Turbine x gemini-ai-lib

vt-turbine-final-gemini-ai-lib.svg
A strong fit for runtime, throughput, and orchestration-heavy package branding.
Finalist Package

Turbine x vt-asset-studio

vt-turbine-final-vt-asset-studio.svg
The most kinetic studio pairing, good for workflows about iteration, variants, and motion.

Facet Final

premium + crystalline
Finalist Base

Facet Final

vt-facet-final.svg
The most premium-looking option, with a tighter silhouette and cleaner inner planes.
Finalist Package

Facet x vt-playground

vt-facet-final-vt-playground.svg
A polished studio direction if you want the playground to feel slightly more elevated.
Finalist Package

Facet x vt-design-system

vt-facet-final-vt-design-system.svg
Less conservative than Keystone, but very memorable as a design-system identity.
Finalist Package

Facet x gemini-ai-lib

vt-facet-final-gemini-ai-lib.svg
A sharp technical badge that still feels a bit premium and future-facing.
Finalist Package

Facet x vt-asset-studio

vt-facet-final-vt-asset-studio.svg
A premium creative-tool direction that feels polished enough for a dedicated studio brand.

Hybrid Logos

Each VT mark fused with each package mark for a full matrix of 20 combination icons.

org x package 20 results

Cascade Combinations

4 package merges
Hybrid

Cascade x vt-playground

vt-cascade-vt-playground.svg
Hybrid

Hybrid

4 package merges

Balanced Hybrids

A second hybrid matrix where the VT brand and the package mark split the visual weight 50/50, with mirrored panels and a shared center seam so both identities read immediately.

50/50 emphasis 20 results

Cascade Balanced Combinations

4 package merges
Balanced Hybrid

Cascade x vt-playground

vt-cascade-vt-playground-balanced.svg
Balanced Hybrid
